scope.description: Fixed TypeError crash in phase_check_command when OR-group subagent requirements (nested lists) are present in phase state JSON

owasp_top_10_assessment: All 10 categories PASS - No vulnerabilities detected across OWASP Top 10

input_validation_assessment.analysis: Changed code processes only internal phase state data structures. No direct user input. Input source is trusted internal JSON files.
validation_mechanisms: isinstance(requirement, list) type check prevents mixed-type errors
Bounded iteration over internal array (max ~20 requirements)

dependency_vulnerabilities.note: 4 npm vulnerabilities exist in devDependencies but are unrelated to this Python CLI tool. No new dependencies introduced.

strengths: Proper error handling at function level

conclusion.description: STORY-464 is a low-risk, secure bugfix with zero security issues detected
conclusion.deployment_status: Ready for deployment - no security blockers
